description: Reusable shape generation templates for LoRA training datasets

commands: PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} VERTICES=${verts} BOUNDS=${bounds} ITERATIONS=${complexity} OPERATIONS=squarewave,split_offset DIRECTION_BIAS=random
PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} VERTICES=${verts} BOUNDS=${bounds} ITERATIONS=${iters} OPERATIONS=${ops} DIRECTION_BIAS=${direction}
PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} VERTICES=${verts} BOUNDS=${bounds} ITERATIONS=${iters} OPERATIONS=split_offset,sawtooth

organic_outline_template.description: Organic polygon outline - flowing natural forms
organic_outline_template.comments: Template for organic shapes using sawtooth operations and inward bias. Creates smooth, flowing outlines.
commands: PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} vertices=${verts} bounds=${bounds} iterations=${iters} operations=${ops} direction_bias=inward break_width_max=${break_width} projection_max=${projection} connect=${connect}

organic_outline_nofill.description: Organic polygon outline - flowing natural forms
organic_outline_nofill.comments: Template for organic shapes using sawtooth operations and inward bias. Creates smooth, flowing outlines.
commands: PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} vertices=${verts} bounds=${bounds} iterations=${iters} operations=${ops} direction_bias=inward break_width_max=${break_width} projection_max=${projection} connect=${connect}

u_block_skinny_legs.description: Organic polygon outline - flowing natural forms, use of U block
u_block_skinny_legs.comments: Template for organic shapes using sawtooth operations and inward bias. Creates smooth, flowing outlines.
commands: PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} vertices=${verts} bounds=${bounds} iterations=${iters} operations=${ops} direction_bias=inward break_width_max=${break_width} projection_max=${projection} connect=${connect} shape=u

u_block_horseshoe.description: Organic polygon outline with wide horseshoe U-indent
u_block_horseshoe.comments: Broad, shallow U-indent with wide feet and subtle asymmetry. Stays short of centroid for a rounded feel.
commands: PROC dynamic_polygon ${name} vertices=${verts} bounds=${bounds} iterations=${iters} operations=${ops} direction_bias=inward break_width_max=${break_width} projection_max=${projection} connect=${connect} shape=u
